STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_RANGER.banter.al: I've seen trees grow faster that this...
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_RANGER.cardsModi: Heartwood Ranger cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_RANGER.descripti:
A ranger who took the Heartwood Oath.
A grim life has darkened her soul.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_RANGER.eventDeat: It will take a lot more than that to break me.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_RANGER.goldMonol: Wow, this pays better than being an agent of the Empire.
STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWOOD_RANGER.title: The Heartwood Ranger
If I wanted to watch something this slow I'd watch the tides come in and out.
STS2_MULUNDUS-EMERALD_MONK.cardsModifier: Emerald Monk cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS2_MULUNDUS-EMERALD_MONK.description:
A monk trained in the ways of the Emerald Serpent Order.
He preserves balance like the ebb and flow of tides.
STS2_MULUNDUS-EMERALD_MONK.eventDeathPre: Phew! That was a close one
STS2_MULUNDUS-EMERALD_MONK.goldMonologue: Sheesh! I'd be lucky if my tavern made this much in a month!
STS2_MULUNDUS-EMERALD_MONK.title: The Emerald Monk
